name: Cosign Signing Connection
description: Service connection for Cosign image signing with private key and password

url.helpText: Name for this Cosign signing connection

inputDescriptors.name: Cosign Private Key
inputDescriptors.description: The content of the Cosign private key file (cosign.key)

inputDescriptors.name: Cosign Public Key
inputDescriptors.description: The content of the Cosign public key file (cosign.pub) - used for verification

inputDescriptors.name: Cosign Password
inputDescriptors.description: Password for the Cosign private key

helpMarkDown: Configure Cosign signing credentials for container image signing in air-gapped environments
